lead.sentence: In Minneapolis-St. Paul-Bloomington, MN-WI, Logistics & Warehouse Jobs is 11% of postings vs 5% nationally — 2.1x national, over-represented.

basis: Adzuna category posting counts (census per category)
method: Category share = category count / metro total (same radius, so CBSA-radius imprecision cancels). Ranked by log2(metro share / national share) — effect size, since near-census counts make a significance test meaningless. Sentences templated from the numbers.
